summary: arXiv's API exposes a single query endpoint for searching and retrieving article metadata in Atom feeds using search_query/id_list filters, pagination, and sorting.

auth.instructions: No API key or OAuth token is required. Per arXiv API guidance, identify your client with a descriptive User-Agent (including contact info) and follow rate limits (for example, no more than one request every three seconds).

endpoints.name: search-query
endpoints.description: Searches arXiv metadata using fielded boolean query syntax with paging and sorting controls.

endpoints.name: lookup-by-id-list
endpoints.description: Returns records for specific arXiv identifiers via comma-delimited id_list.

endpoints.name: combined-query-and-id-filter
endpoints.description: Applies both search_query and id_list in one call, following arXiv's search_query/id_list combination behavior.
